creator: rb@gid.co.uk
text:
Sysinstall doesn't offer the ability to go into fixit
	mode using an NFS-mounted CD. This would be *really
	useful* on machines with no CDROM drive.

Fix: 

You can of course do it by hand from the holographic
	shell.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Boot from the install floppy; select fixit; observe
	the contents of the menu; swear profusely.
